title: Bump RunPod idle timeout to 5 min

log.context: Bump RunPod idle timeout to 5 min

Done. The `pepe-70b-serverless` endpoint (`o1b0e41cm3obbh`) idle timeout has been updated from 1800s to 300s (5 minutes). Note: the previous value was actually 1800s (30 minutes), not 60s as assumed -- so this is a decrease, not an increase. The mutation returned successfully with `idleTimeout: 300` confirmed.
